This product includes software developed at
The Apache Software Foundation (https://www.apache.org/).

Source
------
https://github.com/apache/echarts (release 5.6.0)
Vendored file: server/core/vendor/echarts.min.js
SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0

Integrity
---------
SHA-256: bf4a223524e40b77c304bec67e1222cf551f14880cf42c69dc046558e11c07b1

Recompute with `shasum -a 256 server/core/vendor/echarts.min.js`. The test
suite pins the byte count (see kExpectedEChartsBytes in
tests/unit/server/test_static_js_bundle.cpp). When refreshing the upstream
release, update both this hash and the byte-count constant in lock-step.
